# Attention is currency

> Canonical profile and project links for Jonas Knüppel.

## Core pages
- [Homepage](https://jonasknppel.me/): Jonas Knüppel's personal site and profile.

## Related entities
- [Booked](https://bookedin4u.com/): Outreach and management systems.
- [Kernscale](https://www.kernscale.de/): Brand and digital appearance systems.

## Social profiles
